title: RTX RPG pack
description: small rpg pack, should used to play with friends or to play in singleplayer, to have new game experience and have fun
body: RTX RPG is a small rpg pack with insane graphics! That modpack is based on Create and RPG Series mods. It have good optimization and some realistic animations. Also this pack have way simpler mechanics than ATM packs, and full server side compitability
